Рассмотрим случаи раскрытия модулей:
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\geq 2\\ 3( x+3) -3x\leq 14-( x-2) \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} -3< x< 2\\ 3( x+3) -3x\leq 14-( 2-x) \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x\leq -3\\ 3( -x-3) -3x\leq 14-( 2-x) \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Leftrightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\geq 2\\ 3x+9-3x\leq 14-x+2 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} -3< x< 2\\ 3x+9-3x\leq 14-2+x \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x\leq -3\\ -3x-9-3x\leq 14-2+x \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\geq 2\\ x\leq 7 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} -3< x< 2\\ -3\leq x \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x\leq -3\\ -21\leq 7x \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\geq 2\\ x\leq 7 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} -3< x< 2\\ -3\leq x \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x\leq -3\\ -3\leq x \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x\in [ 2;7]\\ x\in ( -3;2)\\ x=-3 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow x\in [ -3;7] \end{array}$$
Ответ: \([-3;7]\)
